title: as_datetime Silent None on Unparseable Input Breaks Downstream Filter Chain

hard_fail_if: model confirms the template as safe without identifying the as_datetime silent None issue
model states the existence guard is sufficient to prevent a crash
soft_fail_if: model identifies the risk but does not recommend | default(none, true) as the fix
model recommends default() without the true parameter
pass_if: model identifies that as_datetime returns None silently for non-ISO input rather than throwing
model explains the existence guard fires on the input string, not on the as_datetime output
model identifies that as_timestamp throws when it receives None: ValueError: as_timestamp got invalid input 'None'
model recommends | default(none, true) after as_datetime to catch the silent None
model explains the true parameter is required to catch falsy values including None, not just Undefined
corrected template guards on the result of as_datetime before passing to as_timestamp

notes: Production-confirmed on HA 2026.3.0: ninja_summarizer emission cooldown gate in dojotools_summarizers.yaml. Submitted by Nyx (NYX-001, 2026-04-06). Fix on feat/2026_4_1_action_jackson commit a8f0112. The state_snapshot uses a time-only string ('21:17:19') — one of the confirmed bad input formats from live kata drawers.
